Rules.InvariantScript: If(gblCRMode = "New", "Submit New Change Request — Part B: Content & Impact", "Edit Change Request — Part B: Content & Impact")

Patch(CRRequests, gblDetailCR,
  {
    CRDescription: txtDescSCB.Text,
    ReasonForChange: txtReasonSCB.Text,
    DoNothingOption: txtDoNothingSCB.Text,
    AdditionalInformation: txtAdditionalSCB.Text,
    RE_Delta_PerAircraft: txtRESCB.Text,
    NRE_Delta: txtNRESCB.Text,
    TotalCostDelta: txtTotalSCB.Text,
    WeightDelta_PerAircraft: txtW1SCB.Text,
    WeightDelta_AllAircraft: txtWAllSCB.Text,
    AnnualCoWImpact: txtCoWSCB.Text,
    CostCurrency: {Value: ddlCurrencySCB.Selected.Value},
    IsConfidential: ddlConfidentialitySCB.Selected.Value = "Confidential",
    IsDraft: true
  }
);
If(IsEmpty(Errors(CRRequests)),
  Notify("Draft saved.", NotificationType.Success),
  Notify("Save failed — " & First(Errors(CRRequests)).Message, NotificationType.Error)
)

If(
  IsBlank(txtDescSCB.Text),
  Set(gblFormError, "CR Description is required before formal submission"),
  If(CountRows(Filter(CRRequests, CRNumber = gblDetailCR.CRNumber And ID <> gblDetailCR.ID)) > 0,
    Set(gblFormError, gblDetailCR.CRNumber & " already exists — check the CR number"),
    Set(gblFormError, "");
    Patch(CRRequests, gblDetailCR, {
      CRDescription: txtDescSCB.Text,
      ReasonForChange: txtReasonSCB.Text,
      DoNothingOption: txtDoNothingSCB.Text,
      AdditionalInformation: txtAdditionalSCB.Text,
      RE_Delta_PerAircraft: txtRESCB.Text,
      NRE_Delta: txtNRESCB.Text,
      TotalCostDelta: txtTotalSCB.Text,
      WeightDelta_PerAircraft: txtW1SCB.Text,
      WeightDelta_AllAircraft: txtWAllSCB.Text,
      AnnualCoWImpact: txtCoWSCB.Text,
      CostCurrency: {Value: ddlCurrencySCB.Selected.Value},
      IsConfidential: ddlConfidentialitySCB.Selected.Value = "Confidential",
      IsDraft: false,
      CRStatus: {Value: "Submitted"},
      SubmittedDate: Today()
    });
    If(IsEmpty(Errors(CRRequests)),
      Navigate('View CRs Screen', ScreenTransition.None);
      Notify(gblDetailCR.CRNumber & " submitted successfully.", NotificationType.Success),
      Set(gblFormError, "Submission failed — " & First(Errors(CRRequests)).Message)
    )
  )
)

/*
  Submit CR B Screen — OnVisible
  Purpose: Part B of the CR submission form — Content, cost impact and settings.
  Author:  IAG Tech Developer
  Date:    07 Apr 2026
*/
Set(gblFormError, "")
